description:
Inspect an open Locus View host window and return runtime state, viewport information, focused element, and a bounded list of visible actionable DOM elements.
- When Headroom is enabled and output exceeds the compress threshold, large snapshot output is compressed through headroom-ai (requires headroom proxy or HEADROOM_API_KEY).

viewId.description: View id of the open View host window.

selector.description: Optional CSS selector to scope the snapshot.

maxElements.description: Maximum DOM elements to return. Defaults to 120 and is capped by the host.

includeHidden.description: Include hidden elements when true. Defaults to false.
